payload.answer: There is a possible temporal update: the existing memory says the Brain Slack agent is planned and open, while the new information says the Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented. Because the new fact may either supersede the old project status or describe a narrower MVP milestone, user resolution is needed before committing durable memory. Safe actions: approve_supersession if the implemented MVP should replace the planned/open status; keep_both if the project remains open while the MVP is implemented; reject_new if the new statement is incorrect; edit if the wording should be clarified before saving.
citations: Existing project state: The Brain Slack agent is planned, status=open.
New: The Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented.

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement may refer to the same project moving from planned/open to implemented, or specifically to an MVP milestone of the broader Brain Slack agent project. This should not be auto-merged or auto-superseded without confirmation.
